title: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering Colleges in Noida | Galgotias University
content: This program deals with diploma in mechanical engineering to impart quality education and training to fulfill the needs of manufacturing industries mainly to enhance their quality and productivity. This program aims to produce diploma holders in mechanical engineering to meet the challenges of industries successfully and make great achievements in the growing global range. Samsung C&T, in collaboration with Galgotias University and NGO partner NABET India, is offering full tuition fee scholarships under Project Build for Nation for students enrolling in Diploma (Lateral Entry) programs in Mechanical, Civil, and Electrical Engineering. The initiative also includes a 2-year certified AutoCAD training to enhance industry readiness. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology. Engineering mechanics, Strength of Materials, Fluid Mechanics and Machinery, Manufacturing Technology, Mechanical Measurement and Metrology, Thermal Engineering, Workshop Practice, Power plant Engineering, Automobile Engineering and Basic Management Skills. Program Structure01 Impart knowledge of Mathematics, Applied sciences and Engineering. 02 Ability to work in teams on multi-disciplinary projects in industry. 03 Ability to identify, formulate and solve mechanical engineering problems based on data Interpretation, experiment and analysis of results. 04 Develop awareness in the community through the application of knowledge of ethical responsibility to society, employers and employees. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 Communication: An ability to communicate effectively. 10 01 Ability to solve contemporary issues related to manufacturing, design, and Industrial automation through internship integrated program curriculum. 02 Demonstrate and test Mechanical engineering related system for application with real time constraints. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology.
